Hero.trust: We simply connect buyers and sellers — payment and item handover happen directly between you.

Home.trust_free_desc: Post and browse listings for free
Home.trust_community_desc: An expat community across all of Spain

Auth.register_sub: Join the expat community in Spain. It's 100% free.
Auth.name: Full name
Auth.terms: By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
Auth.err_taken: This email is already in use.

PostAd.title: Post an ad
PostAd.sub: Fill in the information below to publish your ad.
PostAd.f_price: Price in euros (leave blank to give away for free)
PostAd.p_description: Describe the condition, dimensions, reason for selling...
PostAd.err_location: Please enter and select a neighbourhood or city
PostAd.upgrade_ok: 3 extra photos unlocked ✓ — you can now add up to 6 photos.
PostAd.photos_admin: Up to {max} photos · JPG, PNG or WebP · max 5 MB each.
PostAd.photos_premium: Up to {max} photos included · JPG, PNG or WebP · max 5 MB each.
PostAd.photos_upgraded: 6 photos unlocked (3 included + 3 purchased) · JPG, PNG or WebP · max 5 MB each.
PostAd.photos_free: 3 photos included for free · JPG, PNG or WebP · max 5 MB each.
PostAd.upgrade_desc: Add 3 extra photos for this ad — one-time payment, no subscription.
PostAd.blocked_hint: If you think this is a mistake, edit your title or description and try again.

PendingReview.title: Ad under review
PendingReview.body: Your ad has been received. It will be published once an administrator has approved it, usually within 24 hours.
PendingReview.note: You will receive a notification once your ad is live.
